reasons: Tigreal can group enemies, giving Lylia a clear area to stack Shadow Energy damage.
Lylia can layer AoE damage after Tigreal creates the crowd-control window.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates a crowd-control window, while Lylia follows with layered AoE damage.
worksBestWhen: Lylia has Shadow Energy pressure prepared before Tigreal engages.
Tigreal catches enemies inside Lylia's follow-up range.
failureCases: Tigreal engages before Lylia is in range.
Lylia uses her damage cycle before the enemies are controlled.
The enemy escapes the zone before Lylia's damage lands.

reasons: Atlas can pull enemies into a predictable area, letting Lylia chain area damage more reliably.
The grouped control gives Lylia a better target zone for her poke-to-burst pattern.

proof.summary: Atlas compresses enemies into one zone, and Lylia punishes that zone with repeated AoE pressure.
worksBestWhen: Lylia waits for Atlas' pull before spending her main damage.
Atlas catches targets in Lylia's effective range.
failureCases: Enemies escape the zone before Lylia's damage lands.
Lylia is forced to reset before following up.
Atlas engages when Lylia is not ready.

reasons: Carmilla links grouped enemies, increasing the value of Lylia's AoE pressure during clustered fights.
Lylia can keep damaging the contested area while Carmilla's link punishes nearby enemies.

proof.summary: Carmilla keeps enemies linked and slowed, while Lylia damages the contested area.
worksBestWhen: Carmilla lands Curse of Blood before Lylia spends her main damage cycle.
Lylia positions safely to continue area pressure.
failureCases: Enemies split apart and break the link.
Lylia is forced to use her reset before following up.
Carmilla links targets outside Lylia's damage zone.

reasons: Lolita protects Lylia from ranged pressure while Lylia pokes and zones from behind the frontline.
Lylia gains more time to place damage safely when Lolita blocks important projectile threats.

proof.summary: Lylia wants time to place damage safely, and Lolita can block many ranged threats.
worksBestWhen: Lolita positions between Lylia and projectile-heavy enemies.
Lylia stays behind the shield line while zoning.
failureCases: Enemies dive around Lolita's shield angle.
Lylia stands too far forward before Lolita can protect her.
The enemy uses non-projectile dive to reach Lylia.

reasons: Minotaur gives Lylia a frontline and sustain layer so she can focus on zoning instead of escaping every engage.
His CC can hold enemies inside Lylia's damage area.

proof.summary: Minotaur absorbs pressure and controls space, giving Lylia safer angles for repeated poke.
worksBestWhen: Minotaur guards the fight entrance while Lylia zones behind him.
Lylia saves her reset for real dive pressure.
failureCases: Lylia is flanked before Minotaur can peel.
Minotaur engages too far from Lylia.
The enemy forces Lylia's reset before the main fight.
